title: Waste Sorting Detection Challenge
description:
Detect and classify waste objects from real conveyor belt images. 
Build the best object detection model across 19 waste categories.
Organized by Avartan Labs pvt ltd.
description_zh:
从真实传送带图像中检测和分类废弃物体。
在19种废物类别中构建最佳物体检测模型。
由Avartan Labs组织。

pages.title: Overview
pages.content:
# Waste Sorting Detection Challenge

## About
Build the best object detection model to detect and classify waste objects from real conveyor belt images captured at a waste sorting facility. Compete across 19 waste categories.

## Dataset
- Train: 5,238 images 
- Test: 1,312 images

## Sample Dataset
Download 50 sample images to visually explore the data:
Go to the **files** tab → download **sample_dataset**.

## Classes (19 total)
| ID | Class | ID | Class |
|----|-------|----|-------|
| 0 | pet-bottle-clear | 10 | sachet |
| 1 | pet-bottle-green | 11 | tetrapack |
| 2 | ldpe-clear | 12 | cardboard-brown |
| 3 | ldpe-hm | 13 | paper-box |
| 4 | ldpe-black | 14 | coconut-shell |
| 5 | hdpe-bottle | 15 | footwear |
| 6 | metal-can | 16 | idpe-colored |
| 7 | milk-packet | 17 | hard-plastic |
| 8 | pp-bag | 18 | other |
| 9 | mlp-packet | | |

## Evaluation Metric
Primary metric: **mAP50** (COCO-style mean Average Precision at IoU=0.50)

## How to Participate
1. SSH into your assigned workstation (credentials shared separately)
2. Train your model on the provided dataset at `/home/user/hackathon/Waste_sorting_dataset/`
3. Generate predictions on the test set
4. Submit using the provided `submit.py` script

## Submission Format
Submit a ZIP file containing `predictions.json` in COCO detection format:
```json
[
  {
    "image_id": 0,
    "category_id": 0,
    "bbox": [x, y, width, height],
    "score": 0.95
  }
]
```

## Rules
- Max 10 official submissions per day
- Training only on provided dataset
- No sharing of model weights between teams
pages.content_zh:
# 废弃物分类检测挑战赛

## 关于
构建最佳目标检测模型，从废弃物分类设施的真实传送带图像中检测和分类废弃物。在19个废弃物类别中竞争。

## 数据集
- 训练集：5,238张图像，YOLO格式标签
- 测试集：1,312张图像
- 格式：YOLO（class x_center y_center width height）

## 类别（共19类）
| ID | 类别 | ID | 类别 |
|----|-------|----|-------|
| 0 | pet-bottle-clear | 10 | sachet |
| 1 | pet-bottle-green | 11 | tetrapack |
| 2 | ldpe-clear | 12 | cardboard-brown |
| 3 | ldpe-hm | 13 | paper-box |
| 4 | ldpe-black | 14 | coconut-shell |
| 5 | hdpe-bottle | 15 | footwear |
| 6 | metal-can | 16 | idpe-colored |
| 7 | milk-packet | 17 | hard-plastic |
| 8 | pp-bag | 18 | other |
| 9 | mlp-packet | | |

## 评估指标
主要指标：**mAP50**（COCO风格的平均精度均值，IoU=0.50）

## 参赛方式
1. SSH连接到分配的工作站（凭据另行共享）
2. 在提供的数据集上训练模型，数据集位置：`/home/user/hackathon/Waste_sorting_dataset/`
3. 在测试集上生成预测结果
4. 使用提供的`submit.py`脚本提交

## 提交格式
提交包含`predictions.json`的ZIP文件，格式为COCO检测格式：
```json
[
  {
    "image_id": 0,
    "category_id": 0,
    "bbox": [x, y, width, height],
    "score": 0.95
  }
]
```

## 规则
- 每天最多3次官方提交
- 仅在提供的数据集上训练
- 禁止团队间共享模型权重
